name: Cowboy Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the beef into a large heavy pot or Dutch oven.
2. Add the chopped onion and pressed garlic.
3. Cook over medium to high heat until the meat is well browned (10 minutes).
4. Add the stewed tomatoes, beef bouillon, chili powder, ground cumin, oregano leaves, salt, and cayenne.
5. Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, for an hour.
6. Add the pinto beans and simmer another 30 minutes. If the chili gets too thick, add water to reach desired consistency.
7. Serve hot.
